covid_2020.label: COVID-19 Crash
covid_2020.description: Global pandemic — fastest 30% drawdown in NSE history. FII panic selling, circuit breakers triggered.
covid_2020.key_risk: Black swan systemic shock; all sectors sold off simultaneously

gfc_2008.label: Global Financial Crisis
gfc_2008.description: Lehman Brothers collapse triggered a global credit freeze. NIFTY fell ~55% from peak to trough.
gfc_2008.key_risk: Global credit contagion; financial sector and real estate worst hit

dotcom_2000.label: Dot-com Bust
dotcom_2000.description: Technology and internet sector bubble burst. Indian IT stocks (Infosys, Wipro, TCS) saw severe drawdowns.
dotcom_2000.key_risk: Sector concentration risk; technology and telecom worst hit

demonetization_2016.label: Demonetization Shock
demonetization_2016.description: Government overnight demonetized ₹500 and ₹1000 notes — uniquely Indian domestic liquidity shock.
demonetization_2016.key_risk: Consumer discretionary, NBFC, and small-cap stocks hit hardest

ilfs_crisis_2018.label: IL&FS Credit Crisis
ilfs_crisis_2018.description: IL&FS defaulted on ₹91,000 Cr debt, triggering NBFC and credit market contagion across Indian financial sector.
ilfs_crisis_2018.key_risk: NBFC liquidity freeze; financial sector and real estate contagion

rate_hike_fii_2022.label: FII Selloff / Rate Hike Cycle
rate_hike_fii_2022.description: US Fed rate hike cycle caused global FII outflows from emerging markets. Rising cost of capital hit growth stocks.
rate_hike_fii_2022.key_risk: Foreign institutional outflows; rising bond yields vs equity returns
